WSPPServiceSupportedContainerViewBeanBase
    public abstract class AMPrimaryMastHeadViewBean
extends AMViewBeanBase
implements com.sun.web.ui.view.tabs.CCNodeEventHandlerInterface
    This is the base class for all view beans that have primary masthead in Console.
